title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Protocol Recall
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a distributable skill plugin after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext distribution. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

stimulus.title: Governance case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext distribution. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills. Artifact under review: a distributable skill plugin.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Governance, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Governance applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.

hints: Name the Governance precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.
